findings.description: The #245 DGH_PY pin loop (now 5 members) and the DIFF-ADDED 'five Python gh-callers' enumerations (CLAUDE.md + docs/DEVFLOW_SYSTEM_OVERVIEW.md, added by this PR's CR-2 fix) omit scripts/build-experiment-records.py — a genuine sixth Python gh-caller (GH = os.environ.get('DEVFLOW_GH') or 'gh', line 79, pre-existing). Independent signal: grep -l DEVFLOW_GH over scripts/*.py -> 6 files vs the audit's 5. The diff-added 'five' claim is false against HEAD (documented_falsehood class), and a bare-'gh' revert in the sixth caller is unpinned.
findings.fix: add build-experiment-records.py to the DGH_PY loop (verify its no-bare-argv0 pin passes), five->six in CLAUDE.md + overview (same #366 carve-out), reconcile loop comment

findings.description: subprocess-spelling audit re-verified complete w.r.t. the independent stdlib-spawn enumeration (0 sites) — clean
